title: bicornella tryphioides
intro: Bicornella tryphioides, also known as the "sensitive plant," is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Bicornella tryphioides include its ability to treat skin conditions, wounds, and infections, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Bicornella tryphioides include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which are made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or mixing them with carrier oils.
